intro.title: READY TO DIVE, SAILORS?
intro.paragraph:
Gaultier challenges you… it’s up to you to take the helm!
Do you really know the Les Males crew?
Prove it, wave after wave, in just 3 questions.
What’s at stake?
A surprise that will make you swoon. And even a little bonus. Classic Gaultier!

quiz.questions_text_additional_info: Select the correct Male from the 6 below

questions.text: WHICH MALE SHINES ON DECK WITH HIS ICONIC GOLDEN CHEST?
WHICH MALE JOINED THE CREW THANKS TO YOUR VOTES?
WHICH MALE WAS THE VERY FIRST TO BOARD?

items.paragraph:
Heat wave in sight!
The voyage promises to be scorching with Le Male Elixir…
An amber trail so sensual that a single drop makes you swoon.
Beneath its fresh demeanor, the spirited lavender quickly takes on a carnal richness, enhanced by the balsamic depth of benzoin with its boozy and vanilla notes.

Le Male In Blue, a new limited-edition wave crafted for daring sailors.
Its spicy aromatic trail sets the course and triggers the wave.
Iconic lavender leads the way, carried along by this blue intensity.
The liveliness of metallic anise snaps like a sail released to the wind, while deep benzoin seals its power.

Set sail for sensuality with this all-muscle fragrance that is both robust and subtle. Both, my captain!

A fresh burst of mint to catch the attention. A warm touch of vanilla to enchant.
Between the two, the spirited elegance of lavender and that clean scent, reminiscent of the shaving soap that shaped Jean Paul Gaultier’s childhood.
What a virile odyssey!

final_result.title: Can you now guess by what criterion they stand before you?

finish.title:
WHAT AN EXTRAORDINARY SAILOR!
WANT TO JOIN THE CREW?
finish.paragraph: Sign up to sail in preview toward our launches, surprises, and exclusive privileges.

end.title:
CONGRATULATIONS AGAIN!
YOU HELD THE HELM WITH BRIO.
end.paragraph:
A true sailor deserves more than just congratulations.
Let us offer you what the crew reserves for the best:
end.cta_label: DISCOVER THE MOST CELEBRATED JPG FRAGRANCES

messages: Bold choice… but not the one we were looking for!
Nice try, but that’s not it!
Not quite, but the intention was there!
So close! But that’s not the one.
